name: AxonPrime Infrastructure Acquisition Corporation Class A Common Stock
summary: AxonPrime Infrastructure Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on identifying businesses that have the potential to benefit from the sponsor's expertise in the infrastructure and energy transition sectors. AxonPrime Infrastructure Acquisition Corporation is headquartered in Princeton, New Jersey.
